curation_notes: The patch adds a maximum length check (maxParseSizeLen = 9) to the parseSize function in server/util.go, preventing integer overflow when parsing extremely large decimal size strings from incoming messages. Only one non-test source file was changed. The pre-assigned vulnerability class integer-overflow (CWE-190) is correct — the fix directly addresses integer overflow in size parsing. Location derived from the patch diff: the parseSize function in server/util.go is the sole vulnerable code path.
